message: execSync is a performance + reliability risk. Replace with async helpers or background tasks.
notes: CLAUDE.md landmine: execSync for PM2 queries blocks the Node event loop.
Prefer pm2 jlist via async exec and symbol-indexed helpers.

message: Direct JSON file state may be a TOCTOU / concurrency landmine; consider moving to Postgres.
notes: Look for shared JSON state on hot paths (agent history, dashboards).
Use SQL tables or queues for concurrent state.

message: Raw Stripe SDK calls should be centralized in core/stripe modules.
notes: New SaaS repos should call core/stripe only, not new Stripe() in app code.

message: Legacy MailerSend usage; preferred provider is Resend with per-site config.
Legacy Maileroo usage; preferred provider is Resend with per-site config.
Direct Redis client creation outside queue/core modules can fragment connection handling.
notes: Prefer centralized queue/Redis clients in core/queue.

message: Inline BullMQ usage; consider normalizing via core/queue abstractions.
notes: Not always a bug; should be reviewed for consistency.
